Package org.eventb.internal.pp.core.provers.predicate

Class ResolutionResolver

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.provers.predicate.ResolutionResolver
All Implemented Interfaces:
IResolver
public class ResolutionResolver extends Object implements IResolver
This class is responsible for applying the resolution rule between one unit clause and a set of non-unit clauses. It is instantiated with an IMatchIterable. Then, it is initialized with a clause and each call of #nextMatch(ClauseDispatcher) returns a new inferred clause, until no more matches are available.
